name: telegram-permission-alert
description: Send Telegram alerts when Claude Code shows a permission dialog, so you can come back and approve blocked work quickly.

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token used to send permission alerts

TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID.description: Telegram chat ID that receives alerts for all projects

TELEGRAM_ALERT_PREFIX.description: Optional message prefix for Telegram alerts

TELEGRAM_NOTIFY_ON.description: Notification mode label for docs and troubleshooting
